## Documentation Definition of Done
- [ ] Public API changes reflected in the package `README.md`
- [ ] Docstrings / doc comments updated for changed behaviour
- [ ] New domain terms added to the glossary (none redefined)
- [ ] Architectural decisions recorded as an ADR
- [ ] New public functions have a worked example
- [ ] Internal doc links resolve

## Architecture
- [ ] Obeys the dependency rule (no forbidden imports)
- [ ] No feature vertical imports another vertical
